subcodes.first_line: Praise befits the peerless Lord, Who hath adorned the heaven of man's station with two shining and luminous stars [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش خداوند بیمانندی را سزاست که آسمان مقام انسانرا بدو ستاره روشن و منور نمود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @predictions and prophecies, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
